scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Male waiter (image2) in ruby red blouse, black pants, and white waist apron glances at the specials board with a half-grin, chatting with brunette young woman (image3) in a cream knit sweater and dark wash jeans who sits on a counter stool facing him. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: blonde female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron carrying a tray. Customers seated in red booths. Warm afternoon diner light. No customers behind counter.
